initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM customer
JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim cat_date ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = cat_date.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim store_date ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_date.d_date_sk
WHERE cat_date.d_year = store_date.d_year - 1
ORDER BY c_customer_sk
LIMIT 100;

SELECT DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN catalog_sales cs1 ON c.c_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON c.c_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id;

SELECT DISTINCT
    c.c_customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN catalog_sales cs1 ON c.c_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON c.c_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d1.d_year) >= 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT d2.d_year) >= 1

SELECT DISTINCT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id
FROM customer
JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (
    SELECT d_year
    FROM date_dim
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ds ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = ds.d_date_sk
    WHERE store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    AND ds.d_year = date_dim.d_year + 1
)

SELECT DISTINCT
  c.c_customer_sk,
  c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN catalog_sales cs1 ON c.c_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON c.c_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  c.c_customer_sk,
  c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN catalog_sales cs1 ON c.c_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON c.c_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id;

candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  c.c_customer_sk,
  c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM catalog_sales cs1
  JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
  JOIN store_sales ss2 ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
  WHERE cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    AND d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
);

SELECT DISTINCT
  c.c_customer_sk,
  c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
  JOIN date_dim d2 ON d1.d_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk + 365
  WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id;

SELECT DISTINCT
    c.c_customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
    JOIN catalog_sales cs2 ON cs2.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs2.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    WHERE d3.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
      AND ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
ORDER BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id;

SELECT DISTINCT
    c.c_customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON d1.d_date_sk + 365 <= d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date_sk < d1.d_date_sk + 370
    JOIN catalog_sales cs2 ON cs2.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs2.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    AND d3.d_year = d1.d_year - 1
)
ORDER BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id;
